children.name: p
children.textContent: AT&T ($89.99) + Electric ($142) both hit before your payday on the 15th. Consider moving Electric auto-pay to Mar 16 to avoid overdraft.

children.name: p
children.textContent: 📈 Seasonal electric spike driving April increase

children.name: p
children.textContent: iCloud + Google One both active. You're paying for 2TB combined but using <200GB total.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Adobe CC + Figma both active. Last Adobe usage was 43 days ago.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Customers who call AT&T and mention competitor rates save an average of $23/mo. Your contract ended 3 months ago.

children.name: p
children.textContent: You haven't visited in 47 days. Next billing cycle hits Apr 1 — cancel before then to avoid another month.

children.name: p
children.textContent: You watched 2 shows this month. The Basic plan covers your usage and saves $8/mo — before the next billing on Mar 28.

children.name: p
children.textContent: You're paying for both iCloud ($9.99) and Google One ($5.99). You use less than 200GB combined — one plan covers you.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Comcast is offering $40/mo for new customers. Ask for a loyalty discount — current customers often get matched.
